title: Joint statement: first UK-Pakistan Trade Dialogue
body: "On Monday 14 July 2025, the UK and Pakistan held the inaugural ministerial-led Trade Dialogue meeting in London.  The Minister for Trade Policy and Economic Security, Douglas Alexander MP, hosted the Federal Minister for Commerce, Jam Kamal Khan to reaffirm the importance of the bilateral trade and investment relationship and discuss next steps to ensure it reaches its full potential. "
